subject: refactor drools chart to allow customizations
commit_message:
refactor drools chart to allow customizations

- move some values out of .conf files to values to avoid
  building the chart when deploying policy (drools).
- move credentials to a single secret file, this is precursor
  work to deal with confidential info in a better way in
  future releases.
- delete unused files.
- generify mounting of configmaps/secrets as volumes to
  avoid explicitly having to modify statefulset.yaml.
- update amsterdam controller with latest version in nexus
  at container instantiation.
- update to the latest released drools image.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1371
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: I1497b61cd210ac4c00b957c2832de5acd01ea4d2
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

policy drools pod is failing
Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Patch Set 2:

oh, right, I depend on the latest drools snapshot image, and "master" goes by released versions and "staging" that uses snapshot is no supported by oom team I understand.

I'll cherry pick to staging and run oom redeploy there to check.   Does it sound as an ok idea?   For this review then, I will have to put it on hold until we have a new released image for pdpd-cl.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> oh, right, I depend on the latest drools snapshot image, and "master" goes by released versions and "staging" that uses snapshot is no supported by oom team I understand.
> 
> I'll cherry pick to staging and run oom redeploy there to check.   Does it sound as an ok idea?   For this review then, I will have to put it on hold until we have a new released image for pdpd-cl.


or you change the container tag values here to STAGING to verify it works (you'll have a -1 for Jobbuilder but OOM deployment will be triggered). So you'll gain confidence that the staging versions are OK.
When they're released, you change the container tags value to the released one.
Nobody is checking "staging" except Gating (but Gating is also checking master)

Thanks for the feedback Sylvain, unfortunately we don't have a suitable staging image available, the jenkins job will fail because of snapshot dependencies with external repo dependencies that have not been released yet.  We'll have to wait then until we officially release.

will place in WIP until we release official image.
